title: Capability-aware delegation first four slices
goal: Implement #706, #705, #707, and #708 in order from #704 capability-aware delegation lane.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Make task difficulty, local target capability metadata, self-assessment authority, and capability-aware handoff packets explicit in package outputs.
intent.constraints: Implement the first four candidate slices in order: #706, #705, #707, then #708. Keep model metadata local-config only and do not add automatic scheduling.

intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
